PostSnail
Admin Forest Manifesto Docs Media Kit

Guide

SnailLift GitHub Pages

SnailLift Sprint 1B supports GitHub Pages as a command assistant.

StepsNo Browser TokenSprint 1B Limit

Steps

Export Website ZIP, extract it into postsnail-public, prepare GitHub settings in the admin, copy the generated commands, run them locally with your own git or GitHub CLI credentials, return to PostSnail, verify live, then notify Forest.

No Browser Token

PostSnail does not ask for or store a GitHub token in the browser for Alpha 1B. GitHub credentials stay with your local git tooling.

Sprint 1B Limit

SnailLift prepares commands and checks public proof files. It does not configure GitHub Pages settings for you or write to GitHub through the browser.
